# MEOK AI Labs — Contact

> CSOAI Ltd, UK Companies House 16939677. 100% Nick Templeman. Registered in England & Wales.

## Emails

- General: hello@meok.ai
- Security: security@meok.ai
- GRC Partners: partners@meok.ai
- Support: support@meok.ai
- Procurement: procurement@meok.ai

## SLAs

- General: 24h business-hours
- Security: 24h acknowledgement, 90-day coordinated disclosure
- Support: 4h (Pro), 1h (Enterprise)

## Phone / video
By appointment only. Use the 30-min Founder Scoping Call (demo-deploy-lyart-delta.vercel.app).
